expression_patterns.take care of: to take care of someone or something
expression_patterns.be attached to: to be attached to someone or something

targets.example: The players walk onto the pitch before kickoff.
The first goal came after only ten minutes.
Brazil needs to score before half-time.
The striker waits for space near the penalty area.
The defender stays close to the fastest forward.
The captain decides to pass the ball wide.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：世界杯决赛开始了，杰克和莉娜在客厅看直播。
scenario_sentences: The players run onto the pitch before the final.
Lena says the striker looks calm and focused.
A defender blocks the first dangerous pass.
The captain passes the ball toward the right side.
Brazil scores the first goal after fifteen minutes.
Jack thinks that goal may change the whole match.
scenario_mandarin: 决赛开始前，球员们跑上球场。
莉娜说这名前锋看起来冷静又专注。
一名后卫挡住了第一次危险的传球。
队长把球传向右路。
巴西在十五分钟后打进第一个进球。
杰克认为这个进球可能会改变整场比赛。

targets.example: The referee gives a foul near the box.
The winger chooses to shoot from a tight angle.
She can dribble past two defenders easily.
The save keeps the team in the match.
His tackle was strong, but it was completely fair.
The striker was offside when the pass was played.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：世界杯半决赛进入下半场，场面越来越紧张。
scenario_sentences: The referee gives a foul just outside the box.
The winger tries to dribble past the last defender.
A clean tackle stops him before he can shoot.
Moments later, the striker is clearly offside.
The goalkeeper makes the save of the tournament.
scenario_mandarin: 裁判在禁区外判了一次犯规。
边锋试图带球过掉最后一名后卫。
一次干净的铲球在他射门前阻止了他。
片刻之后，前锋明显越位了。
守门员做出了本届赛事最佳扑救。

targets.example: This recipe is simple, but the flavor is excellent.
One portion is enough if you serve it with rice.
The seasoning gives the soup a warmer taste.
We can save the leftovers for lunch tomorrow.
Let the sauce simmer for twenty minutes.
Please chop the onions into small pieces.

scenario_sentences: Anna chooses a recipe for spicy tomato soup.
Mark chops the onions while the water heats up.
Anna adds seasoning and lets the soup simmer.
They make one extra portion for Anna's brother.
After dinner, they put the leftovers in the fridge.

targets.example: The renovation should make the kitchen much brighter.
The hallway looks smaller because of all the clutter.
The old appliance uses too much electricity.
I need to tidy the living room before dinner.
The neighbors complain about noise after ten.
It is considerate to warn neighbors before a party.

scenario_sentences: Emma plans a small renovation in her kitchen.
She removes clutter from the hallway first.
Her brother helps her replace one noisy appliance.
Emma will tidy the living room before guests arrive.
She tells her neighbors, so they do not complain about noise.
Her neighbor says the message was very considerate.

targets.example: Running twice a week can improve your stamina.
Her morning routine includes stretching and coffee.
Good posture can reduce pain during long workdays.
Always stretch gently before a long run.
I struggled to keep up with the faster runners.
My legs are sore after yesterday's workout.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：诺亚和萨拉一起开始新的健身计划。
scenario_sentences: Noah wants to build stamina before summer.
Sara suggests a simple weekly routine.
They stretch before running around the park.
Noah checks his posture during each exercise.
He cannot keep up with Sara at first.
The next morning, his legs are sore.
scenario_mandarin: 诺亚想在夏天之前增强耐力。
萨拉建议一个简单的每周训练安排。
他们在公园跑步前先拉伸。
诺亚在每个动作中检查自己的姿势。
一开始，他跟不上萨拉。
第二天早上，他的腿很酸痛。

targets.example: The queue at security moved very slowly.
I saved my boarding pass on my phone.
The luggage allowance is lower on this ticket.
The announcement said our gate had changed.
Our flight may get delayed because of heavy rain.
We still have time to make our connection.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：米娅和丹尼尔在机场赶一次转机。
scenario_sentences: Mia checks the luggage allowance before leaving home.
Daniel saves both boarding passes on his phone.
The queue at security is longer than expected.
An announcement says their first flight may get delayed.
Mia worries they will not make their connection.
scenario_mandarin: 米娅出门前检查行李额度。
丹尼尔把两张登机牌都存在手机上。
安检队伍比预期更长。
广播通知说，他们的第一班飞机可能会延误。
米娅担心他们赶不上转机。

targets.example: They had chemistry from the first conversation.
A healthy boundary can make a relationship stronger.
Commitment matters more than impressive words.
I get along with her friends very well.
He decided to break up with her after a long talk.
You should be honest with your partner about money.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：索菲亚和朋友谈论一段新的感情。
scenario_sentences: Sophia says she and Leo have real chemistry.
Her friend asks if Leo respects her boundaries.
Sophia says they get along with each other's families.
She wants commitment, not just romantic messages.
Her friend tells her to be honest with Leo.
Sophia is not planning to break up with him.
scenario_mandarin: 索菲亚说，她和利奥之间真的很有默契。
她的朋友问利奥是否尊重她的界限。
索菲亚说他们和彼此的家人相处融洽。
她想要承诺，而不只是浪漫的信息。
她的朋友告诉她要对利奥诚实。
索菲亚并不打算和他分手。

targets.example: My younger sibling often asks me for advice.
Looking after children is a serious responsibility.
Their parents set a curfew for school nights.
I promised to look after my cousin tonight.
Parents need to set limits without shouting.
Try to be patient with younger children.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：奥利维亚帮妹妹照顾两个孩子。
scenario_sentences: Olivia agrees to look after her sister's children.
Her younger sibling says it is a big responsibility.
Olivia explains the curfew before dinner.
She tries to set limits without sounding strict.
When the children argue, she is patient with them.
scenario_mandarin: 奥利维亚同意照顾她妹妹的孩子。
她的妹妹说这是一项很大的责任。
晚饭前，奥利维亚解释了回家时间规定。
她努力设定界限，同时不显得太严厉。
孩子们争吵时，她对他们很有耐心。

targets.example: This jacket was a real bargain in the sale.
You can ask for a refund within thirty days.
This size fits better across the shoulders.
The fabric feels soft but looks very durable.
I want to try on the blue coat.
The shoes are expensive, but they are worth it.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：克洛伊和朋友周六下午去买衣服。
scenario_sentences: Chloe finds a coat that looks like a bargain.
She checks the fabric before choosing a size.
Her friend tells her to try it on first.
The smaller size fits better than expected.
Chloe asks if she can get a refund later.
She decides the coat is worth it.
scenario_mandarin: 克洛伊找到一件看起来很划算的外套。
她在选择尺码前检查了面料。
她的朋友告诉她先试穿一下。
小一号的尺码比预想中更合身。
克洛伊询问之后是否可以退款。
她决定这件外套值得购买。

targets.example: A high temperature can be a serious symptom.
The diagnosis was clear after the blood test.
The doctor gave me a prescription for antibiotics.
I need to book an appointment for tomorrow.
Try to describe your symptoms clearly.
I am allergic to several common painkillers.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：卢卡早上打电话给诊所预约看医生。
scenario_sentences: Luca calls the clinic to book an appointment.
The nurse asks him to describe his symptoms.
Luca says his main symptom is a painful cough.
He explains that he is allergic to one medicine.
After the check-up, the doctor gives a diagnosis.
Luca receives a prescription before leaving.
scenario_mandarin: 卢卡打电话给诊所预约。
护士请他描述自己的症状。
卢卡说，他的主要症状是咳嗽时疼痛。
他解释说自己对一种药过敏。
检查后，医生给出了诊断。
离开前，卢卡拿到了处方。

targets.example: Photography became her favorite hobby during winter.
The weekend workshop teaches basic watercolor techniques.
He made a quick sketch of the old bridge.
I want to pick up a hobby that feels relaxing.
You improve at drawing by practicing small details.
Her designs are inspired by old family photos.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：伊莎贝尔想在工作之外培养一个新的创造性爱好。
scenario_sentences: Isabel wants to pick up a relaxing hobby.
She joins a weekend workshop at the library.
The teacher asks everyone to draw a quick sketch.
Isabel is inspired by an old photo of her grandmother.
She hopes to improve at drawing over time.
scenario_mandarin: 伊莎贝尔想开始一个让人放松的爱好。
她参加了图书馆的周末工作坊。
老师请每个人画一张快速草图。
伊莎贝尔受到一张祖母旧照片的启发。
她希望随着时间推移在绘画方面进步。

targets.example: Her commute takes forty minutes on a good day.
This district has several small parks and cafes.
The new crossing is safer for every pedestrian.
It is easy to get around by tram here.
The station is crowded during the evening rush.
It took me months to settle into the city.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：本刚搬到一座新城市，正在适应日常生活。
scenario_sentences: Ben is trying to settle into his new city.
His district has quiet streets and good cafes.
He uses the tram to get around most days.
The station is crowded during his morning commute.
A new crossing makes the road safer for pedestrians.
scenario_mandarin: 本正在努力适应他的新城市。
他所在的城区有安静的街道和不错的咖啡馆。
大多数日子，他坐有轨电车出行。
早上通勤时，车站很拥挤。
一个新的过街通道让这条路对行人更安全。

targets.example: A spontaneous plan can be more fun than expected.
Nora is reliable, so she always arrives on time.
The arrangement works well for everyone.
I want to catch up with Sam this weekend.
Please show up before the movie starts.

targets.meaning: 临时取消和某人的约定
targets.example: I hate to cancel on friends at the last minute.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：诺拉和山姆计划周末见面喝咖啡。
scenario_sentences: Nora wants to catch up with Sam on Saturday.
Sam suggests a spontaneous walk after coffee.
Their arrangement is simple and flexible.
Nora is reliable, so Sam knows she will show up.
Sam promises he will not cancel on her again.
scenario_mandarin: 诺拉想在周六和山姆见面叙旧。
山姆建议喝完咖啡后临时去散步。
他们的安排简单又灵活。
诺拉很可靠，所以山姆知道她会到场。
山姆保证不会再临时取消和她的约定。

targets.example: The plot becomes darker in the final episode.
My favorite character changes a lot during the story.
The opening scene is quiet but powerful.
Many viewers think the sequel is overrated.
I recommend the series if you enjoy slow dramas.
Please do not spoil the ending for me.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：艾拉和朋友聊昨晚看的新剧。
scenario_sentences: Ella recommends a new series to her friend.
She says the opening scene is beautifully filmed.
Her favorite character makes a difficult choice.
The plot becomes tense in episode three.
Ella refuses to spoil the ending.
Her friend thinks the show may be overrated.
scenario_mandarin: 艾拉向朋友推荐一部新剧。
她说开场场景拍得非常漂亮。
她最喜欢的角色做出了一个艰难的选择。
剧情在第三集变得紧张起来。
艾拉拒绝剧透结局。
她的朋友认为这部剧可能被高估了。

targets.example: The venue is small, but the sound is excellent.
I made a playlist for the train ride.
The lyrics are simple but surprisingly emotional.
The band will perform live on Friday.
Everyone started to sing along during the chorus.
The concert was sold out within two hours.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：阿米尔和朋友准备去听一场小型演唱会。
scenario_sentences: Amir checks whether the concert is sold out.
The venue is near the old train station.
His friend sends a playlist for the journey.
Amir already knows most of the lyrics.
When the band performs live, everyone sings along.
scenario_mandarin: 阿米尔查看演唱会是否已经售罄。
场馆在老火车站附近。
他的朋友发来一份旅途中听的播放列表。
阿米尔已经知道大部分歌词。
乐队现场表演时，大家都跟着唱。

targets.example: The shelter has several dogs waiting for homes.
Keep the dog on a leash near busy roads.
The dog's calm temperament suits the family well.
They hope to adopt a cat this spring.
Children can learn to take care of a pet.
The dog is deeply attached to its owner.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：莉莉和哥哥去动物收容所考虑领养一只狗。
scenario_sentences: Lily visits a shelter with her brother.
They want to adopt a calm older dog.
The worker explains the dog's gentle temperament.
Lily buys a leash before taking him home.
Her brother promises to take care of him too.
Within a week, the dog is attached to Lily.
scenario_mandarin: 莉莉和哥哥一起去动物收容所。
他们想领养一只安静的年长狗。
工作人员解释了这只狗温和的性情。
带它回家前，莉莉买了一条牵引绳。
她的哥哥也承诺会照顾它。
一周之内，这只狗就很依恋莉莉。

targets.example: The forecast says heavy rain will arrive tonight.
The heatwave made it difficult to sleep.
A brief shower cleared the air in the afternoon.
The apartment should cool down after sunset.
The weather will warm up again next week.
It is humid today, so the air feels heavy.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：凯特和邻居讨论周末天气和出门计划。
scenario_sentences: Kate checks the forecast before planning a picnic.
The heatwave should end on Saturday evening.
A short shower may arrive after lunch.
Her apartment will cool down during the night.
Sunday should warm up without becoming too humid.
scenario_mandarin: 凯特在计划野餐前查看天气预报。
热浪应该会在周六晚上结束。
午饭后可能会有一场短暂阵雨。
她的公寓会在夜间凉快下来。
周日会变暖，但不会太潮湿闷热。

targets.example: My feed is full of travel photos today.
Her comment was polite but very direct.
Check your privacy settings after every update.
I scroll through my feed during the commute.
I rarely post personal photos online.
You can mute someone without unfollowing them.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：梅和朋友整理自己的社交媒体使用习惯。
scenario_sentences: May scrolls through her feed after breakfast.
She notices a rude comment under her photo.
Her friend tells her to check her privacy settings.
May decides not to post personal details anymore.
She also chooses to mute one stressful account.
scenario_mandarin: 梅早餐后浏览自己的信息流。
她注意到照片下面有一条不礼貌的评论。
她的朋友告诉她检查隐私设置。
梅决定不再发布个人细节。
她还选择屏蔽一个让她有压力的账号。

targets.example: I cancelled one subscription that I never used.
Our grocery bill has increased since winter.
Rent is my largest monthly expense.

targets.meaning: 减少某方面支出或使用
targets.example: We should cut back on takeaway meals.
Let's split the bill evenly between us.
The plan is affordable if we cook at home.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：乔和室友一起检查这个月的生活开支。
scenario_sentences: Joe notices that the grocery bill is higher.
His largest expense is still the rent.
His roommate suggests cancelling one subscription.
They agree to cut back on takeaway meals.
They split the bill for shared household items.
The new budget is strict but affordable.
scenario_mandarin: 乔注意到食品杂货账单更高了。
他最大的开支仍然是房租。
他的室友建议取消一个订阅服务。
他们同意减少外卖。
他们分摊共同家用品的账单。
新的预算很严格，但可以负担。

targets.example: Fluency improves when you speak every day.
Her accent is clear and easy to understand.
A mistake is useful if you learn from it.
You can pick up a phrase from a podcast.
I practice regularly with short daily conversations.
She wants to be fluent in English by next year.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：雷切尔和朋友讨论如何提高英语口语。
scenario_sentences: Rachel wants to improve her fluency this year.
She records herself to understand her accent better.
Her friend says every mistake can teach her something.
Rachel tries to pick up a phrase from each podcast.
She plans to practice regularly after dinner.
Her goal is to be fluent in everyday English.
scenario_mandarin: 雷切尔想在今年提高自己的流利度。
她录下自己的声音，以便更好地了解自己的口音。
她的朋友说，每个错误都能教她一些东西。
雷切尔努力从每期播客中学会一个短语。
她计划晚饭后定期练习。
她的目标是流利掌握日常英语。

targets.example: A quiet getaway can help you reset after work.
The old tower is the town's main landmark.
This route follows the river for several miles.
We love to wander around small towns without a plan.
We can check in after three o'clock.
The museum is small but worth visiting.

lessons.scenario_intro: 情境：哈娜和汤姆计划一次轻松的周末短途旅行。
scenario_sentences: Hana suggests a quiet weekend getaway by the coast.
Tom chooses a scenic route along the river.
They check in at a small hotel after lunch.
In the afternoon, they wander around the old town.
The main landmark is crowded but worth visiting.
scenario_mandarin: 哈娜建议去海边进行一次安静的周末短途旅行。
汤姆选择了一条沿河的风景路线。
午饭后，他们在一家小酒店办理入住。
下午，他们在老城区四处闲逛。
主要地标很拥挤，但值得参观。
